narrative:
Bowling Green 4-H (precinct in Wood County) has 894 registered voters, with 46.9% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 25.8% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 27.3%, a narrow Democratic lean of 1.5 percentage points.
